description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named RPM Build that runs on push to the master branch, ignoring changes to docs, README.md, and NEWS.md, and only for tags. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, extract the release version from the tag, generate an RPM spec file, build the RPM package using tstack/rpmbuild, upload the artifact, and push it to packagecloud.io if the push is a tag.
